message:
fix: hide docked rigs from Mayor tmux status line

Docked rigs are intentionally disabled and don't need display real estate.
Filter them out before building the rig LED display, freeing the stop
indicator to be repurposed for error states (crashed agents, unreachable
Dolt, etc.). Parked rigs still show with the parking indicator.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
